scripts.test:prod-config: npm run build && NODE_ENV=production node -e "import('./dist/index.js').then(({ createRinaCloudApiServer }) => { try { createRinaCloudApiServer(); process.exit(1); } catch (err) { if (!String(err && err.message || err).includes('Missing production Rina Cloud env vars')) process.exit(1); } })"
